enhanced_question: What is the date of application for this Regulation, as specified in Article 45 thereof, and by what mechanism shall it be implemented in the Member State(s) concerned, with a view to determining its effective date of entry into force?
variants: What is the date from which this Regulation applies, as stipulated in Article 45, and by what process will it be incorporated into the national legal order of the relevant Member State(s), thereby determining its actual entry into force?

When does this Regulation take effect, according to Article 45, and through what procedural mechanism will it be integrated into the domestic law of the affected Member States, thus establishing its effective date of implementation?

original_question: What is the percentage by which customs duty is reduced for products originating from ACP/OCT countries?
enhanced_question: What is the rate of reduction in customs duty applicable to goods originating from countries benefiting from the Lomé Convention or the Cotonou Agreement, as set forth in Article 9(1) of this Regulation?
variants: Under what conditions does the reduced customs duty rate stipulated in Article 9(1) apply to goods imported from countries participating in the Lomé Convention or Cotonou Agreement?
What is the specific percentage reduction in customs duties specified in Article 9(1) for goods originating from countries benefiting from these agreements?
